overall.description: First-person perspective from inside an aerial cable car traversing a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The tram descends to stop at station CC214 where the character draws a handgun, then continues through dense urban canyons and over busy streets with neon-lit buildings and moderate traffic below.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial tram descending to station platform

events.description: tram slows down and arrives at CC214 station platform

agents.ego_description: descending in aerial tram toward station platform CC214, observing the approach through the front window

entered.detail: station platform with yellow safety lines and CC214 signage visible ahead
tall modern glass facade building with illuminated windows passing by
metal security bars at the front of the tram

segments.scene_description: The tram descends through the night city toward station CC214. The teal interior frame is visible as the vehicle approaches the platform with its yellow safety lines, slowing down as it nears the station structure.

events.description: tram comes to complete stop at station platform
character draws handgun and holds it while observing the seated passenger
security gates open and tram begins to depart station

agents.ego_description: standing in stopped tram holding a handgun, looking toward seated passenger near the window

notable_agents.action: seated passenger in dark clothing looking out the window calmly

entered.detail: padded bench seating inside the tram with geometric pattern upholstery
warm yellow neon strip lighting illuminating the station interior
red and white graffiti tags on the station wall visible through the window

segments.scene_description: The tram stops at the covered CC214 station platform. Security gates block the exit while a passenger sits calmly on the right bench. The character draws a handgun and holds it while waiting. After a moment, the gates open and the tram prepares to depart.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial tram route through dense urban canyon

events.description: exits station into open air between high-rise buildings
passing close to orange industrial building facade with exposed beams

agents.ego_description: traveling through dense urban canyon with neon-lit buildings and industrial structures passing by

entered.detail: multi-story building with distinctive orange facade and exposed steel support beams
large teal-colored ventilation and air conditioning units on building rooftops
elevated roadway structure with support columns running parallel to the tram route

segments.scene_description: Departing the station, the tram enters a narrow urban canyon between towering buildings. The camera passes close to an orange industrial building with exposed steel beams, while teal HVAC units and neon signage dot the surrounding architecture. The route follows parallel to an elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial tram over multi-lane arterial road

events.description: emerges from building canyon to open view over busy highway with traffic
tram passes over intersection with moderate traffic flow of cars and trucks below

agents.ego_description: observing moderate traffic on multi-lane road below from the elevated tram perspective

entered.detail: busy multi-lane arterial road with moving vehicle traffic visible below
large illuminated digital billboard displaying advertisements on building facade
parallel elevated railway track structure with concrete support columns

segments.scene_description: The tram emerges from the building canyon into an open view over a busy multi-lane highway. Vehicles move steadily below while large digital billboards illuminate the scene. The tram continues alongside an elevated train track, passing over intersections with moderate traffic flow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a cable car that descends into a futuristic station before gliding through a dense, neon-lit urban canyon. It begins with the vehicle slowing down toward station CC214, the teal interior frame visible as the platform and its yellow safety lines approach. As the tram comes to a halt at the covered station, the camera lingers on a passenger and security gates while a handgun is drawn and held, remaining steady until the gates open and the vehicle departs. The scene then shifts into a narrow urban canyon, passing close to an orange industrial building with exposed steel beams and teal HVAC units while tracking parallel to an elevated highway. Finally, the view opens up over a busy multi-lane highway filled with steady traffic and illuminated by large digital billboards as the tram continues alongside an elevated train track.
